messages.content:
script about Tournament seeds (list by region)
The tournament seeds and regions were determined through the NCAA basketball tournament selection process.

1	South Carolina	SEC	32–0	Automatic
2	Maryland	Big Ten	25–6	At-Large

Games

And that's the list of the tournament seeds by region! Now let the games begin!
in the south, the number 1 seed, south caorlina will be taking on the winner of southern vs sacred hear

Actually, that's not accurate. The South Carolina Gamecocks were assigned as the number 1 seed in the Greenville Regional 1 and will be taking on the winner of the Norfolk State vs Appalachian State play-in game. Southern and Sacred Heart are not in the same regional as South Carolina. It's important to keep track of the correct matchups to keep up with the tournament!
the 8 seed, the south florida bulls will be playing 9 seeded marquette

Yes, that's correct! The South Florida Bulls, assigned as the 8 seed in the Greenville Regional 1, will face the Marquette Golden Eagles, who were assigned as the 9 seed. It should be an exciting game between these two teams!
the 5 seeded oklahoma sooners, big 12 regular season co-champions, will be playing the 12 seeded portland pilots, winners of the wcc tournament

Yes, that's accurate! The Oklahoma Sooners, assigned as the 5 seed in the Greenville Regional 1, will face the Portland Pilots, who were assigned as the 12 seed and won the West Coast Conference (WCC) tournament. It will be interesting to see how these teams match up and who will come out on top!
the winners of the big sky, the 13 seeded sacramento state hornets will be taking the 4 seeded ucla bruins

Yes, that's correct! The Sacramento State Hornets, assigned as the 13 seed in the Greenville Regional 1 after winning the Big Sky Conference tournament, will face the UCLA Bruins, who were assigned as the 4 seed. It should be an exciting game between these two teams and we'll have to see who comes out on top!
the 6 seed the creighton bluejays  will be playing the winner of illinois vs mississippi state

Actually, there was an update to the tournament bracket and the Creighton Bluejays, assigned as the 6 seed in the Greenville Regional 1, will face UC Santa Barbara, who was assigned as the 11 seed. Illinois and Mississippi State were assigned to different regions. It's important to keep up with any updates to the bracket to make sure you don't miss any games!
the 3 seed notre dame fighting irish, acc regular season champions will be playing the 14 seeded southern utah thunderbirds, the winners of the

Yes, that's accurate! The Notre Dame Fighting Irish, assigned as the 3 seed in the Greenville Regional 1 after winning the ACC regular season championship, will face the Southern Utah Thunderbirds, who were assigned as the 14 seed and won the Western Athletic Conference (WAC) tournament. It will be interesting to see how these teams match up and who will come out on top!
the 7 seeded arizona wildcats will be playing the 10 seeded west virginia mountaineers

Yes, that's correct! The Arizona Wildcats, assigned as the 7 seed in the Greenville Regional 1, will face the West Virginia Mountaineers, who were assigned as the 10 seed. It should be an exciting game between these two teams and we'll have to see who comes out on top!
last in this region the 2 seed, the maryland terrapins will be playing the 15 seed holy cross crusders the patriot league tournament champions

That's correct! The Maryland Terrapins, assigned as the 2 seed in the Greenville Regional 1, will face the Holy Cross Crusaders, who were assigned as the 15 seed and won the Patriot League tournament championship. It will be interesting to see who comes out on top in this matchup!
in region 2, the first four game is tennesse tech ovc champions and monmouth the champions of the

Actually, there was an update to the tournament bracket and Tennessee Tech and Monmouth did not make the field and were not included in the First Four games. The First Four games in Region 2 were between Mount St. Mary's and Texas Southern. Thank you for keeping up with the tournament and checking for any updates or changes!
the winner of msmu and tsu will play 1 seed indiana

That's correct! The winner of the First Four game between Mount St. Mary's and Texas Southern, which was won by Texas Southern, will face the Indiana Hoosiers, who were assigned as the 1 seed in the Greenville Regional 2. It should be an intriguing matchup between these two teams!
